title: Condiments
description: A variety of Vanilla+ features to add some extra flavor to your modded Minecraft game!
body:
Condiments

A (Neo)Forge/Fabric mod which includes a collection of functional and decorative features that expand on the game a bit beyond what you may expect from Vanilla. As of 1.2.0, the mod requires [Moonlight Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) to dynamically create blocks to support all modded wood types.
Current Features |Image|Description| | :---: | :--- | | ![Polished Log Set](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c02eb5e4-b8f8-47ea-9c72-922ddad24fd8) | **Polished Logs**

Crafted with a log and a honeycomb
Can be made into wood (6 sided bark)
Does not stick to sticky pistons
*(1.2.0+)* Generated for all modded woods | | ![Wood Wall Set](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/08e9efad-604a-4917-9c1a-2d11c3b7265c) | **Wood Walls**

Crafted with 6 logs
Pillars use the log texture, and the inner walls use the stripped log texture
Inner wall model rotates to follow wood grain
*(1.2.0+)* Generated for all modded woods | | ![Wood Accent Set](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4f3c8e5c-e3c2-4d2a-88d3-56169ed6d942) | **Wood Accents**

*(1.3.0+)* Crafted with 2 stripped logs
*(1.2.0-)* Crafted with 3 slabs
Places exactly like stairs
*(1.2.0+)* Generated for all modded woods | | ![Crates Set](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b29c829d-28dd-4590-9928-aa37ce28a053) | **Crates**

Crafted with 6 logs and a barrel
Holds 64 stacks of 1 item type
Can be dyed all 16 colors
Can lock the item type by crafting it with a redstone torch
Can unlock it by doing the same with a stick
Keeps their contents when destroyed
Functions like a bundle when in an inventory
Empty crates stack to 64
Interacted with similarly to other "Storage Drawer" type mods when placed
Fill level can be easily checked both when placed and in an inventory
*(1.2.0+)* Will place contained blocks (sneak to place crate itself)
*(1.4.0+)* Can be crafted with a hopper to enable auto-pickup, making picked up items go into their matching crate | | ![Rail Intersection](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2d463cfe-c792-45e8-ae69-4bd441c04c7d) | **Rail Intersection**

Crafted with 2 rails
Works as expected | | ![Analog Rails](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a3377e42-e9e0-4255-b6dd-9e458da5bc88) | **Analog Rails**

Crafted with a single powered rail, redstone, and quartz
Speed determined by redstone power level
Speed ranges from 0-1.5x powered rail speed *(configurable 1.3.1+)*
Much faster acceleration compared to powered rails
Rail power can be read by a comparator | | ![Blackened Iron](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3b6209e4-b0ca-4c16-bc3b-6a0b8ff6f3a7) | **Blackened Iron**

Crafted by waxing iron, then adding fire directly above or beneath
Decorative set based on the cauldron/hopper/etc palette | | ![Waxed Iron](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7eac5172-5380-4728-a3e6-c73147d81cf2) | **Waxed Iron**

Crafted by waxing iron blocks either in world or in a crafting table
If set on fire or cooked from below, will turn into blackened iron | | ![Redstone LEDs](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/902002b3-2ad5-4ac6-91a2-be4f957005ce) | **Redstone LEDs**

Crafted with red, green, and blue dye, a redstone lamp, and a quartz
Displays different colors depending on redstone power level
Colors follow the [chat color codes](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes#Color_codes)
Can be read by a comparator
Does not emit light | | ![Copper Fire](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8e6c0c90-2c06-4aad-aefc-110f18ab3241) | *(1.2.0+)* **Copper Fire**

(Currently decorative only) fire
Appears on oxidize-able copper blocks or copper ores
Will not appear on waxed copper blocks | | ![Saucer Lights](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6806a09e-0c46-412b-84ce-bce2fa830858) | *(1.3.0+)* **Saucer Lights**

Toggled when shift-clicked with an empty hand, or when powered from the back
Redstone toggles it like a copper bulb
Crafted with 4 blackened iron ingots and a redstone lamp | | ![Beacon Beam Termination](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8493f484-3d4a-44fe-bb6b-23c9af2486dd) | *(1.3.0+)* **Beacon Beam Termination**

Beacon beams will now travel up to, but not past, tinted glass
Effects still work; range is adjusted accordingly
Can be disabled in the config | | ![Braziers](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9f198ac1-28d9-420f-94c3-e40f3503fada) | *(1.4.0+)* **Braziers**

Can be lit and extinguished like a campfire
Crafted with 3 blackened iron ingots and a piece of coal |
Expect more to come!
